sentence: 香港基本法规定了特区的基本制度。
pinyin: Xiānggǎng jīběnfǎ guīdìng le tèqū de jīběn zhìdù.
english: The Hong Kong Basic Law stipulates the fundamental systems of the Special Administrative Region.

sentence: 这款免费软件可以帮你把PDF转成Word。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn miǎnfèi ruǎnjiàn kěyǐ bāng nǐ bǎ PDF zhuǎn chéng Word.
english: This freeware can help you convert PDFs into Word documents.

sentence: 请留下你的联系方式。
pinyin: Qǐng liú xià nǐ de liánxì fāngshì.
english: Please leave your contact details.

meaning: 1. underlayer; 2. lower class; 3. lower strata; 4. substrate
sentence: 柜子的下层放着旧书。
pinyin: Guìzi de xiàcéng fàngzhe jiù shū.
english: Old books are placed on the bottom shelf of the cabinet.

sentence: 这位历史学家花了十年研究明朝。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lìshǐxuéjiā huā le shí nián yánjiū Míng cháo.
english: This historian spent ten years studying the Ming dynasty.

meaning: 1. to reschedule; 2. to rearrange (e.g. a meeting); 3. to postpone
sentence: 会议因故改期到下周三。
pinyin: Huìyì yīn gù gǎiqī dào xià zhōu sān.
english: The meeting has been rescheduled to next Wednesday.

sentence: 汉语属于汉藏语系。
pinyin: Hànyǔ shǔyú Hàn-Zàng yǔxì.
english: Chinese belongs to the Sino-Tibetan language family.

sentence: 时任市长出席了开幕式。
pinyin: Shí rèn shìzhǎng chūxí le kāimùshì.
english: The then mayor attended the opening ceremony.

meaning: 1. to span; 2. to stretch across; 3. to travel across
sentence: 这座大桥横跨整条河流。
pinyin: Zhè zuò dàqiáo héngkuà zhěng tiáo héliú.
english: This bridge spans the entire river.

sentence: 宿舍楼每月进行一次防火检查。
pinyin: Sùshè lóu měi yuè jìnxíng yī cì fánghuǒ jiǎnchá.
english: The dormitory building conducts a fire prevention inspection every month.

sentence: 研究者发现这种植物有抗炎作用。
pinyin: Yánjiūzhě fāxiàn zhè zhǒng zhíwù yǒu kàngyán zuòyòng.
english: Researchers found that this plant has anti-inflammatory properties.

sentence: 街角坐着一个老花子。
pinyin: Jiē jiǎo zuò zhe yī gè lǎo huāzi.
english: An old beggar was sitting at the street corner.

sentence: 游客在海洋馆里看到了表演的海豚。
pinyin: Yóukè zài hǎiyángguǎn lǐ kàndào le biǎoyǎn de hǎitún.
english: Visitors saw performing dolphins at the aquarium.

meaning: 1. headman (of primitive people); 2. tribal chief; 3. used as translat
sentence: 部落酋长主持了传统仪式。
pinyin: Bùluò qiúzhǎng zhǔchí le chuántǒng yíshì.
english: The tribal chief presided over the traditional ceremony.

sentence: 这个词特指书面语。
pinyin: Zhège cí tèzhǐ shūmiànyǔ.
english: This word refers specifically to written language.

sentence: 这种材料经久耐用。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng cáiliào jīngjiǔ nàiyòng.
english: This material is long-lasting and durable.

sentence: 把盐放入水中就能配成溶液。
pinyin: Bǎ yán fàng rù shuǐ zhōng jiù néng pèi chéng róngyè.
english: Adding salt to water can make a solution.

sentence: 这件纪念品花了她五百卢比。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn jìniànpǐn huā le tā wǔ bǎi lúbǐ.
english: This souvenir cost her five hundred rupees.

meaning: 1. (one moment ...,) the next ...; 2. trailing foot (in walking)
sentence: 他前脚刚走，后脚她就来了。
pinyin: Tā qiánjiǎo gāng zǒu, hòujiǎo tā jiù lái le.
english: He had barely left when she arrived right after.

sentence: 本市今天最高气温为三十二度。
pinyin: Běn shì jīntiān zuìgāo qìwēn wéi sānshí'èr dù.
english: The highest temperature in our city today is 32 degrees.

meaning: 1. a series of books; 2. a collection of books
sentence: 图书馆新买了一套历史丛书。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn xīn mǎi le yī tào lìshǐ cóngshū.
english: The library newly purchased a set of history book series.

sentence: 这个村庄是由同一氏族的人组成的。
pinyin: Zhège cūnzhuāng shì yóu tóngyī shìzú de rén zǔchéng de.
english: This village is made up of people from the same clan.

sentence: 云南位于中国西南部。
pinyin: Yúnnán wèiyú Zhōngguó xīnánbù.
english: Yunnan is located in the southwestern part of China.

sentence: 春节前家家户户贴门神。
pinyin: Chūnjié qián jiājiā hùhù tiē ménshen.
english: Before the Spring Festival, every household puts up door god pictures.

sentence: 新兵每天都要参加高强度的军事训练。
pinyin: Xīnbīng měitiān dōu yào cānjiā gāo qiángdù de jūnshì xùnliàn.
english: New recruits take part in high-intensity military training every day.

meaning: non-staple foods; (Tw) solids (food for infants other than breast milk
sentence: 超市里的副食品种类很丰富。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de fùshípǐn zhǒnglèi hěn fēngfù.
english: The supermarket has a wide variety of non-staple foods.

sentence: 他迷上了博彩，把积蓄都输光了。
pinyin: Tā míshàngle bócǎi, bǎ jīxù dōu shūguāng le.
english: He got hooked on gambling and lost all his savings.

sentence: 她大学主修犯罪学，毕业后想当警察。
pinyin: Tā dàxué zhǔxiū fànzuìxué, bìyè hòu xiǎng dāng jǐngchá.
english: She majored in criminology in college and wants to become a police officer after graduating.

sentence: 这个项目已经发包给一家外地公司。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù yǐjīng fābāo gěi yī jiā wàidì gōngsī.
english: This project has already been contracted out to a company from another city.

sentence: 拍延时视频时要把相机固定在云台上。
pinyin: Pāi yánshí shìpín shí yào bǎ xiàngjī gùdìng zài yúntái shàng.
english: When shooting time-lapse videos, you need to mount the camera on a tripod head.

sentence: 他在大学选修了一门西方艺术史课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiūle yī mén xīfāng yìshùshǐ kèchéng.
english: He took a Western art history elective at university.

sentence: 这篇作文里有好几个错字，要改一下。
pinyin: Zhè piān zuòwén lǐ yǒu hǎojǐ gè cuòzì, yào gǎi yīxià.
english: There are quite a few typos in this essay that need to be corrected.

sentence: 老师发给我们一份新的时间表。
pinyin: Lǎoshī fā gěi wǒmen yī fèn xīn de shíjiānbiǎo.
english: The teacher handed out a new schedule to us.

sentence: 这座铜像是用传统工艺铸造的。
pinyin: Zhè zuò tóngxiàng shì yòng chuántǒng gōngyì zhùzào de.
english: This bronze statue was cast using traditional craftsmanship.

sentence: 他承包了小区的绿化工程。
pinyin: Tā chéngbāo le xiǎoqū de lǜhuà gōngchéng.
english: He contracted the landscaping project for the residential complex.

sentence: 她的话是出于善意，你别误会。
pinyin: Tā de huà shì chūyú shànyì, nǐ bié wùhuì.
english: She said it with good intentions — don't misunderstand her.

sentence: 这个软件和新系统不兼容，需要更新。
pinyin: Zhège ruǎnjiàn hé xīn xìtǒng bù jiānróng, xūyào gēngxīn.
english: This software is not compatible with the new system and needs to be updated.

meaning: 1. to detain; 2. to hold in custody; 3. to distrain; 4. to seize prope
sentence: 海关扣押了一批没有申报的货物。
pinyin: Hǎiguān kòuyā le yī pī méiyǒu shēnbào de huòwù.
english: Customs seized a batch of undeclared goods.

meaning: 1. first rate; 2. top rank; 3. number one
sentence: 他是这个城市的头号厨师。
pinyin: Tā shì zhège chéng shì de tóu hào chú shī.
english: He is the number one chef in this city.

sentence: 这块土地是私有财产，外人不得进入。
pinyin: Zhè kuài tǔdì shì sīyǒu cáichǎn, wàirén bùdé jìnrù.
english: This plot of land is private property; outsiders are not allowed to enter.

sentence: 这辆车发动机的马力非常大。
pinyin: Zhè liàng chē fādòngjī de mǎlì fēicháng dà.
english: The engine of this car has a very high horsepower.

meaning: 1. to press; 2. to urge; 3. to hasten
sentence: 老师敦促学生按时交作业。
pinyin: Lǎoshī dūncù xuésheng ànshí jiāo zuòyè.
english: The teacher urged students to hand in homework on time.

sentence: 记者发稿前需要核实所有信息的真实性。
pinyin: Jì zhě fā gǎo qián xū yào hé shí suǒ yǒu xìn xī de zhēn shí xìng.
english: Reporters need to verify the accuracy of all information before filing a story.

sentence: 很多歌迷在场外等着见偶像。
pinyin: Hěn duō gē mí zài chǎng wài děng zhe jiàn ǒu xiàng.
english: Many fans waited outside the venue hoping to see their idol.

sentence: 合唱团的每位团员都认真备战了这次演出。
pinyin: Héchànɡtuán de měi wèi tuányuán dōu rènzhēn bèizhànle zhè cì yǎnchū.
english: Every member of the choir prepared seriously for this performance.

meaning: 1. special duty; 2. assigned full time to a task
sentence: 学校聘请了一位专职心理辅导老师。
pinyin: Xuéxiào pìnqǐng le yī wèi zhuān zhí xīnlǐ fǔdǎo lǎoshī.
english: The school hired a full-time counseling teacher.

sentence: 新技术帮助农民大幅增产。
pinyin: Xīn jì shù bāng zhù nóng mín dà fú zēng chǎn.
english: The new technology helped farmers significantly increase production.

meaning: branch; service outlet (of a bank, retail store etc); (printing) halft
sentence: 这家银行在市区有很多网点。
pinyin: Zhè jiā yínháng zài shìqū yǒu hěnduō wǎngdiǎn.
english: This bank has many branch outlets in the city.

sentence: 活期存款随时可以取出来。
pinyin: Huóqī cúnkuǎn suíshí kěyǐ qǔ chūlái.
english: Money in a current account can be withdrawn at any time.

meaning: electric vehicle (commonly refers to e-bikes, scooters or electric car
sentence: 他每天骑电动车上班。
pinyin: Tā měitiān qí diàndòngchē shàngbān.
english: He rides his electric scooter to work every day.
